name: TC-NFR-001: User Registration Performance Test
description: Verify that the user registration endpoint (/api/v1/users/register) meets performance requirements under simulated concurrent load of up to 100 users.
corresponding_NFR: NFR-1: User Registration (Create Operation) — response time ≤ 500 ms at 95th percentile, error rate < 1%, throughput ≥ 150 req/sec.
preconditions: Email and username must be unique per test run (use timestamp or random data).
Authentication is not required for this endpoint.
Application must be in a clean state (avoid email duplication).

input_data.notes: Use unique username/email values per request (e.g., append timestamp).

notes: Use a data parameterization strategy (e.g., CSV feed or timestamp suffix) to avoid duplicate email/username conflicts. Monitor server logs for any 4xx/5xx errors during the run.
